content_body: My little boy and I had a fantastic getaway and time well spent together! Thank you so much for offering such a fabulous cabin in such a beautiful location. My goodness y'all have been so polite to us! We love that we have been able to take short little walks right here at eh cabin! We saw deer when driving in too! We just loved chilling out inside because it is so amazing in here. My little guy wants to live in here. :) Thank you again, we would LOVE to make the trip heree again! ~ The Cahans
title: Time Well Spent Together!
